items.title: Fonttrio Launches as Open-Source Font Pairing Registry for shadcn/ui
items.summaryShort: Fonttrio Launches as Open-Source Font Pairing Registry for shadcn/ui. Fonttrio is an open-source font pairing registry designed for shadcn/ui projects, featuring 49 curated font combinations that can be installed via a single command.

items.title: Cloudflare Ships Dynamic Workflows, Bringing Durable Execution to Per-Tenant and Per-Agent Code
items.summaryShort: Cloudflare Ships Dynamic Workflows, Bringing Durable Execution to Per-Tenant and Per-Agent Code. Cloudflare released Dynamic Workflows, an MIT-licensed library that extends its durable execution engine so workflow code can differ per tenant

items.title: AWS Improves Aurora Serverless: 45% Faster Ramp-Up, 30% Higher Throughput
items.summaryShort: AWS Improves Aurora Serverless: 45% Faster Ramp-Up, 30% Higher Throughput. AWS has recently announced that WorkMail will be discontinued and that App Runner will stop accepting new customers and move into maintenance mode.

items.title: How GitHub Is Securing Agentic Workflows in Modern CI CD Systems
items.summaryShort: How GitHub Is Securing Agentic Workflows in Modern CI CD Systems. GitHub detailed a defense-in-depth security architecture for agentic workflows in CI/CD pipelines, focusing on isolation, constrained execution, and auditability.

items.title: Presentation: Leadership in AI-Assisted Engineering
items.summaryShort: Presentation: Leadership in AI-Assisted Engineering. Justin Reock discusses the reality of AI’s impact on engineering, moving past anecdotes to hard data from DORA and DX research.

items.title: Voice AI in India is hard. Wispr Flow is betting on it anyway.
items.summaryShort: Voice AI in India is hard. Wispr Flow is betting on it anyway..

items.title: So you've heard these AI terms and nodded along; let's fix that
items.summaryShort: So you've heard these AI terms and nodded along; let's fix that. The rise of AI has brought an avalanche of new terms and slang.

items.title: Fintech startup Parker files for bankruptcy
items.summaryShort: Fintech startup Parker files for bankruptcy. Parker, a well-funded startup offering corporate credit cards and banking services, has filed for bankruptcy and is widely reported to have shut down.
